inputs.label: Weight Lifted
inputs.businessContext: The load lifted during training, representing the external force applied.

businessContext_i18n.en: The load lifted during training, representing the external force applied.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Antrenman sırasında kaldırılan yük, uygulanan dış kuvveti temsil eder.
businessContext_i18n.de: Das im Training gehobene Lastgewicht, das die äußere Kraft darstellt.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Charge soulevée pendant l'entraînement, représentant la force externe appliquée.

inputs.label: Repetitions
inputs.businessContext: Number of consecutive repetitions performed with the given weight, indicating muscular endurance.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of consecutive repetitions performed with the given weight, indicating muscular endurance.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Verilen ağırlıkla art arda yapılan tekrar sayısı, kas dayanıklılığını gösterir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der aufeinanderfolgenden Wiederholungen mit dem gegebenen Gewicht, Indikator für Muskelausdauer.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de répétitions consécutives effectuées avec le poids donné, indiquant l'endurance musculaire.

inputs.label: Body Weight
inputs.businessContext: Lifter's body weight for relative strength calculations.

businessContext_i18n.en: Lifter's body weight for relative strength calculations.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Göreceli kuvvet hesaplamaları için sporcunun vücut ağırlığı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Körpergewicht des Sportlers für relative Kraftberechnungen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Poids corporel du sportif pour les calculs de force relative.

inputs.label: Sets
inputs.businessContext: Number of sets performed, influencing total training volume.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of sets performed, influencing total training volume.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Gerçekleştirilen set sayısı, toplam antrenman hacmini etkiler.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der durchgeführten Sätze, beeinflusst das gesamte Trainingsvolumen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de séries effectuées, influençant le volume d'entraînement total.

inputs.label: Rest Period
inputs.businessContext: Rest interval between sets, affecting recovery and subsequent performance.

businessContext_i18n.en: Rest interval between sets, affecting recovery and subsequent performance.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Setler arası dinlenme aralığı, toparlanmayı ve sonraki performansı etkiler.
businessContext_i18n.de: Ruheintervall zwischen den Sätzen, beeinflusst Erholung und nachfolgende Leistung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Intervalle de repos entre les séries, affectant la récupération et la performance ultérieure.

inputs.label: Fatigue Factor
inputs.businessContext: Estimated fatigue accumulation per set, affecting effective load capacity.

businessContext_i18n.en: Estimated fatigue accumulation per set, affecting effective load capacity.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Set başına tahmini yorgunluk birikimi, etkili yük kapasitesini etkiler.
businessContext_i18n.de: Geschätzte Ermüdungsakkumulation pro Satz, beeinflusst die effektive Lastkapazität.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Fatigue estimée accumulée par série, affectant la capacité de charge effective.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
